name: LOWES COMPANIES INC
business: Lowe's Companies, Inc. is the world's second-largest home improvement retailer, operating 1,759 stores in the United States and over 540 branch locations in the United States and Canada, including branches from acquisitions of Foundation Building Materials and Artisan Design Group.

exposures.sentence: Lowe s Companies, Inc. and subsidiaries (the Company) is the world s second-largest home improvement retailer and operated 1,759 stores and outlets in the United States as of January 30, 2026.

catalysts.sentence: For fiscal 2026, our guidance for capital expenditures is approximately $2.5 billion.

catalysts.event: Quarterly dividend increase to $1.20 per share
catalysts.sentence: In the third quarter of fiscal 2025, we increased our quarterly dividend payment by 4% to $1.20 per share.
